raw_excerpt: Introducing dynamic workflows in Claude Code. Claude Code CLI/Desktop/VS Code/API/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry. Available on Max/Team/Enterprise + API. Dynamic workflows dynamically write orchestration scripts that run tens to hundreds of parallel subagents in a single session, checking its work before anything reaches you. Trigger keyword 'ultracode' (renamed from 'workflow'). Effort menu: Low/Medium/High/Max (High default on Opus 4.8). Fast Mode: 2.5x output tokens/sec at 3x lower cost; up to 2x cost for 2.5x speed. Mid-conversation System Messages preserve prompt cache. May 28, 2026 (Claude Code 2.1.154).
